name: World Finance
description_short: Dallas, TX World Finance at 1909 S Buckner Blvd offers personal loans to local customers with flexible terms and quick approval.
description_long:
World Finance at 1909 S Buckner Blvd in Dallas, TX is a standalone personal loan office serving the South Dallas area. Located on Buckner Boulevard, this branch is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 5:30 PM, giving working residents a convenient weekday window to apply for loans or discuss their financing options.

This Dallas location specializes in personal loans for residents who need quick access to cash for emergencies, debt consolidation, or major expenses. Call +1 214-391-3603 to speak with a loan officer about available loan amounts, repayment terms, and what you'll need to bring to your appointment.

As a Dallas resident needing a personal loan, visiting the Buckner Boulevard office means dealing directly with local loan officers who understand the Texas lending market. Bring valid ID and proof of income when you visit; approvals often happen quickly, same-day in many cases. World Finance provides flexible personal loan solutions across the Dallas area.
pros: Personal installment loans with fixed monthly payments — more structured than payday loans
Credit building program available alongside lending
Tax preparation services offered in-branch — bundled financial services
Refund advance loans let borrowers access anticipated tax refunds early
Roadside assistance (motor club) available as an add-on service
Bilingual service — staff speak Spanish at this Memphis location
In-person one-on-one service with staff who walk through loan contracts in detail
cons: No APR or loan amount ranges disclosed on the website — borrowers must visit or call to learn costs
Strictly in-person model — no prominent online application or account management portal mentioned
Limited hours (Mon–Fri 9AM–5:30PM, Saturday hours unspecified, closed Sundays)
Single branch serving Memphis — not convenient for all parts of the city
Refund advance loans and motor club add-ons may increase total cost of borrowing
best_for: Near-prime or subprime borrowers who want an installment loan with fixed payments
Borrowers who prefer in-person guidance and want their contract explained step by step
Spanish-speaking consumers in Memphis seeking bilingual loan services
Tax filers who want a refund advance and prefer handling loans and taxes in one place
diagnosis: World Finance is best for borrowers with limited credit history who need a structured installment loan and value face-to-face service — particularly Spanish speakers in Memphis. The main caveat is that interest rates are not disclosed online, so consumers must contact the branch directly to understand the full cost before committing.
services: One-on-one financial guidance from branch staff
meta_description: World Finance at 1909 S Buckner Blvd, Dallas, TX. Personal loans with flexible terms and quick approval.
seo_title: World Finance in Dallas, TX | CreditDoc
